faqs.question: How can I get into SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.
MBA/PGDM Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

placements.overview:
Established in 1999, SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) is located in Tamil Nadu. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 17 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for SKP Engineering College (SKPEC) courses stands around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026

review_content.Placements: The maximum and minimum salaries that recruiters offer to final-year students range between 15.4 Lacs and 3.2 Lacs, respectively. Almost 50% of students begin their internships for a stipend from the second year itself. Top companies like Accenture and Deloitte hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are individual laboratories for each department. Depending on student strength, all necessities are arranged in the laboratories. Food is available at all times in the college canteen. Our teachers also encourage us to concentrate on sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: One of the top engineering colleges in Tiruvannamalai.

review_content.Placements: Most of the placement opportunities were from core companies, with only a small number of non-core companies arriving for placements. The highest salary package is offered by non-core companies. The departments of Computer Science and Electronics and Communication have very good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: A large number of lab technicians and teachers work in our college. Nearly 1,000+ students graduate from our college every year. We are required to wear formal dress within the college, and they check our dress codes, shoes, and ID cards daily. They collect fines when students don't wear their ID cards.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: SKP Engineering College is absolutely a good engineering college in Tamilnadu.

review_content.Placements: SKP Engineering College is a more reputed placement college. This college has a separate placement training cell. They brought more reputed MNC companies for these college campus interviews. Tech Mahindra, TCS, Infosys, Zoho, Accenture, Wipro, and Amazon—these companies offered more job opportunities to these college students. 95 percent of students placed in good companies. Salary packages are INR 2.8-15 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: SKP Engineering College has good laboratories and well-equipped library facilities. This college has more computer laboratories. This college hostel's facilities were very good. The hostel food is very hygienic. This college has good sports grounds and coaching staff facilities. Emergency medical facilities are also here in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Probably one of the best options

review_content.Placements: Most of my relatives studied in this college, and they got placed with a monthly salary starting from 25000 and it may go up to 75000 per month. Based on their recommendations, I have joined this college. Now I am working as an intern in the role of a software developer with a stipend of 10000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: According to our convenience, we may pay our tuition fees on time. We can pay our fees through both online and offline facilities. Also, medical camps were conducted once a year for regular medical check-ups. The most comfortable environment with all the facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026

review_content.Placements: Till now, 19.7 lakhs is the highest salary package offered by recruiters. Also, they had guaranteed a placement to all the graduated students at least at the start-up companies with a minimum salary package of upto 2.4 lakhs per annum. We have industrial exposure at every semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: Delicious foods with different menus to be followed by canteen contractors on every single day. Usually, they charge for foods and transportation along with the tuition fees. Book fees are also charged along with the due/records fees. Also, placement fees should be charged separately.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: SKP Engineering College is really a good college.

review_content.Placements: SKP Engineering College is one of the best engineering colleges. The placement training provided by the college was excellent. faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in B M Group of Institutions (BMGI) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
B M Group of Institutions (BMGI) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
BCA Candidate must have passed Three years Diploma Program conducted by the State Board of Technical Education or any other examination recognized by the State Board of Technical Education as equivalent thereto.
BBA Candidates who have passed 10+2 or its equivalent with mentioned marks in any discipline can apply. Final year 10+2 or intermediate students can also apply
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering from a recognized board with minimum 50%.
B.Ed Candidate must have passed graduation from a recognized University/Institute.
B.Pharma Candidate must have minimum age 17 years or more. Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.
D.Pharma Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination with pass in Chemistry, Physics, Biology/Mathematics and English from Board of School Education, Haryana, or examination froma recognized board/ university. Candidate who are in First year of the three years degree courses in science are also eligible. Must have passed regular 10+2 examination only in science academic stream. Candidate who have passed 12 years Higher Secondary Education Board Exam (Science academic stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology) of Higher Secondary Education Board, Nepal are also eligible. Candidate who has passed from Open School education system of the Central Govt./ State Govt. institutions are eligible for admission. Candidates having pre-university examinations (new scheme) of Andhra University with Physics, Chemistry, Maths or Physics, Chemistry, Biology are not eligible.
After 10th Diploma Candidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination and obtained at least 35% marks (33% in case of candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes category or Kashmiri Migrants Category) at the qualifying examination.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have passed Master of Computer Applications (MCA) or M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT/ Software) or M.Sc. (Maths.) or M.Sc. (Physics) with the mentioned marks marks in aggregate alongwith valid GATE score in Computer Science & Engineering/IT from a recognized Institute/ University (47.5% is for SCT/ST of Haryana State.)
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have passed Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with not less than 50% marks ( 47.5 % is for SC/ST of Haryana candidates ) in aggregate or any examination recognized by M.D. University, Rohtak as equivalent thereto.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and if you want to complete pharmacy at an affordable price, then choose it.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in our course. The highest package is about 4-6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Abbott. 60% of students get internships in Sun Pharma, Cipla, etc. Quality assurance and clinical pharmacist roles in hospitals are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. Diploma in Pharmacy, Diploma in Engineering, B.Tech, M.Tech, BCA, B.Pharmacy, MBA, and so on are available. Wi-Fi has a good connection, and labs are also well maintained. The library and classrooms are also good. The quality of food is also good, but the canteen is too expensive. Sports facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.title: I prefer everyone to take admission.

These students have great knowledge about their course and they have the highest average package of 800000 per annum. And the lowest package of 300000 per annum. The staff members are also good and kind towards students. The medical facilities are provided to both the day scholars and the hostlers. The sports equipment is also provided for the hostlers.

admission_overview.college_name: Narasaraopeta Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Narasaraopeta Engineering College admissionsare merit-based. The institution evaluates the score of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for admission.Narasaraopeta Engineering Collegeoffers various courses which includes BTech, MTech, MBA, and MCA. Courses offered here are in affiliation withJawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada. Candidates can apply online for their preferred programme byNarasaraopeta Engineering Collegeor reach out to the admission office for offline admission.

Narasaraopeta Engineering College offers various courses in the field of Engineering at both the UG and the PG course levels. Candidates are required to participate in the admission process to get a chance at securing a seat in their desired course. The courses are offered in a full-time/ offline mode. Learn more about the highlights of the college through the table given below:
Particulars
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
10+ courses in various specialisations
How to apply?
https://www.nrtec.in/admission-procedure
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Narasaraopeta Engineering College offers a variety of UG and PG courses for interested candidates in the field of Engineering. Candidates wishing to apply for admissions are required to meet the eligibility criteria and follow the selection process to stand a chance at getting the final admission offer. The table below showcases theNarasaraopeta Engineering College courseeligibility and selection criteria.
Class 12 with at least45% aggregate,with PCM as main subjects
Bachelor's degree with at least50% aggregatein a relevant course
GATE/ AP PGECET
Bachelor's degree with at least50% aggregate
Bachelor's degree with at least50% aggregate

Narasaraopeta Engineering College admissions begin with registration. Candidates need to apply for the course of their choice and for the entrance exam that is required. Candidates are shortlisted for admission through candidates performance in the entrance exams. The step-wise admission process to get a seat in the Narasaraopeta Engineering College is mentioned below:
STEP 1: Narasaraopeta Engineering College Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply to various UG and PG courses in the field of Engineering based on their eligibility. Candidates must fill out the application form with accurate details regarding their personal and academic life. Candidates are required to separately apply for entrance exams as well. Candidates must download the application form once the fee is paid in order to keep for future reference.
STEP 2: Selection and Shortlisting

The college considers various entrance exam scores, such as APICET and AP PGCET, etc for admission to the MTech, BTech, and other courses. Candidates who are shortlisted based on their rank in the entrance exams are invited for further admission rounds or to pay the course fee to secure their seat.
STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation

After the release of theNarasaraopeta Engineering College cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theNEC feeto confirm their seats in the university.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied because of the faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure will be average. We have a good library with good books. Wi-Fi is not there. Labs are good. But there's no use in having good labs. Because faculty members don't teach how to do activities in the lab, we can copy the values. Not every lab in charge is like that. 3 out of 10 lab in charges are good and genuine. I am a day scholar. But according to my information, hostel food is average. For the hostel, they are charging more money per year. After the first year of co...

reviews.review_heading: The best college and a number of facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very pleasant and cool. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is available, outing is available, canteen is available, and stationery, all the things that students need are available on my campus. Food is very hygienic. Morning tiffin, afternoon lunch with 2 curries, evening snacks and night dinner with curry, sambar, curd with pickles.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is 70% good. I mean, average. The overall infrastructure is average. The Wi-Fi signal is weak. The library is good, and they provide different types of books in the central library of the college. Coming to hostel food, it is not very good, as you would expect, so it's better to join outside the campus. It is better to prefer outside hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Actually, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is 70% good, I mean average. The overall infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi signal is weak. Library is good and they provide different types of books in the central library in college. Coming to hostel, the food is not much good as you expect, so it's better to join outside the campus. It is better to prefer outside hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and decent placements, but faculty support needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our CSE department has good facilities overall. The labs are well equipped with updated systems, reliable internet, and the whole campus had Wi-Fi access. Classrooms are spacious with projectors and decent seating. The library is well maintained with a good collection of technical books, journals, and e resources. In terms of hostel facilities, rooms are clean and fairly comfortable, though sometimes a bit crowded. The mess food is average. Manageable, but not great , the canteen has better opti...

reviews.review_heading: Narasaraopeta Engineering College fosters innovation, excellence, and bright careers for students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in lab sessions only, not in the classrooms. The labs are organized with a well-structured infrastructure and systems for work. Classrooms are big and neat to survive. In the library, we have to choose from many books to gain pace and knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Narasaraopeta Engineering College (Autonomous).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is excellent. The infrastructure of our hostel is nice, and it provides good food with morning milk and evening snacks. Overall our course and college hostel is nice and excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC think placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different laboratories, none of which depend on the other department's labs. All departments' books are available in the library. In the hostel, good quality food is provided. Weekly 2 twice government nurses come to our college to supply tablets.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC, think placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different laboratories, none of which depend on the other department labs. All department books are available in the library. In the hostel, good quality food is provided. Every two weeks, government nurses come to our college to supply tables.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC, think placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different laboratories, one of which depends on other department labs. All department books are available in the library. In the hostel, good quality food is provided. Twice a week, government nurses come to our college to supply tables.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements with opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with LCD projectors/smart boards to support interactive learning. For CSE programming labs, networking lab, and AI & ML labs are available. For ECE, electronics lab, communication lab, and VLSI Lab are available. For mechanical, CAD/CAM labs, workshops, thermal and fluid mechanics labs are available. It has rich collection of textbooks, journals, magazines, and reference materials. It has access to e-resources such as IEEE, Springer, J-Gate...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Good, not bad. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, sports and games, is good, not bad.

reviews.review_heading: The climate is too cool. The infrastructure facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facility was not bad, but compared to other colleges near us, it is very nice. Sports are also conducted, like chess, football, cricket, and volleyball. In hostels, the water facility is good, but in the mess, the food quality is good for others as well.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC, think placement.
reviews.review_text: In our college, every department has different laboratory that depends on the other department's lab. Department books are available in library. In the hostel, good quality is provided. Weekly 2 times government nurse come to hostel in our college. It provides good safety for girls hostel, and every day clean the room. Boys hostel cleaning every day is good measure of the hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Curriculum in Narasaraopet Engineering College is very good and changes over time.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of Narasaraopet Engineering College hostel are very good and hygienic. Labs are very nice. Food in the canteen is very good and hygienic. Medical facilities are available in the Narasaraopet Engineering College.

Here's what students and alumni think:* Placement: Most students (around 90%) got placed in top companies like TCS, Wipro, and Zoho, with decent packages ranging from INR5 LPA to INR12 LPA. The highest package offered was INR12 LPA, and the average package was INR8 LPA.* Teaching and Curriculum: Faculty members are generally experienced and supportive, with a focus on making students industry-ready. The course curriculum is relevant, and professors use innovative teaching methods.* Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a library are available. However, some areas need improvement, such as the hostel rooms and limited book availability in the library.* Student Life: Campus life is lively, with regular cultural events and sports competitions. The college has a good reputation among employers and offers various extracurricular activities.* Internship Opportunities: About half of the students (50%) received internships from top companies during their academic tenure.Overall, CKCET appears to be a good choice for those seeking a solid education in engineering, with a focus on industry relevance and placement assistance. While some areas may require improvement, the majority of students reported positive experiences.Note: These findings are based on the statements provided by students and alumni, and may not represent the entire student body.
